data.title: Soybean Oil Market projected to hit $229.06 billion by 2033 from $89.91 billion in 2024, with 10.95% CAGR till 2033.
data.description: In Dublin, a recent report on the Soybean Oil Market forecasts significant growth, with the market expected to reach a value of US$229.06 billion by 2033. This marks a substantial increase from US$89.91 billion recorded in 2024, reflecting an impressive Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 10.95% from 2025 to 2033. The surge in demand for plant-based oils, rising health awareness among consumers, the versatile applications in both food and industrial sectors, the increasing utilization for biodiesel production, are highlighted as key factors driving this growth trajectory.

data.title: Meta to end political ads in E.U. in October due to new E.U. regulation, claiming it has "unworkable requirements."
data.description: Meta announced that political advertising would cease in October due to a new E.U. regulation with challenging requirements ahead.
